title: Release doubt, allow inspired ideas
subtitle: A release-and-allow practice for when good ideas arrive and doubt dismisses them before they land.
excerpt: A short energy statement from the MONEY program. The release targets the habit of overriding profitable instincts; the allow opens to ideas arriving with ease.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Week 7 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you've just had an idea and the immediate response was doubt rather than curiosity.

content.text: A short energy statement for the pattern of overriding a profitable instinct before it can be examined. The release names what's in the way; the allow sets the direction.
I am ready to release all doubt that dismisses my ideas before they have a chance. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow inspired, profitable ideas to find me easily. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Drawn from the Week 7 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release/allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
